steps.title: Identify the noun phrase requirements
steps.content: The blank is the subject of “adapted” and must be a noun phrase agreeing in number with the plural pronoun “their.” The passage describes residents from one island.

steps.title: Apply possessive form and number agreement
steps.content: For correct possessive form and number agreement, pair a singular possessive modifier with a plural noun. Choice A “island's residents” correctly pairs “island's” with “residents,” agreeing with “their.” Choices B and D misuse possessive and non-possessive forms together, while C creates a double possessive. This matches choice A — A is correct.
